name: cost-spike-scale-down
description: OpenCost budget spike: identify and scale down idle or over-provisioned workloads
steps: Query OpenCost for top consumers: GET /model/allocation?window=1d&aggregate=pod&namespace=<ns>
Identify idle pods (CPU < 5% for > 30min) or over-replicated deployments
Check if KServe InferenceService has idle replicas: kubectl get isvc -n <namespace>
Scale down idle KServe model: kubectl patch isvc <name> --patch '{"spec":{"predictor":{"maxReplicas":1}}}'
Scale down over-replicated deployments: kubectl scale deployment <name> --replicas=<target>
Set namespace resource quota if missing: kubectl apply -f namespace-quota.yaml
Monitor spend reduction in OpenCost after 10 minutes
Update HPA (HorizontalPodAutoscaler) min replicas to prevent future over-scaling
